mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM vip_benefit b LEFT JOIN user_info ou ON b.origin_user_id = ou.userId LEFT JOIN user_info hu ON b.user_id = hu.userId

SELECT b.vip_benefit_id AS vipBenefitId, TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(ou.nickname, ''), ' ', COALESCE(ou.phone, ''))) AS buyerText, TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(hu.nickname, ''), ' ', COALESCE(hu.phone, ''))) AS holderText, c.card_name AS cardName, s.storeName AS storeName, b.origin_price AS originPrice, DATE_FORMAT(b.created_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdDate, DATE_FORMAT(b.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS startTime, DATE_FORMAT(b.expire_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS expireTime, b.transfer_count AS transferCount, CASE WHEN b.status = 0 THEN '正常' WHEN b.status = 1 THEN '已转出' WHEN b.status = 2 THEN '已冻结' WHEN b.status = 3 THEN '已过期' WHEN b.status = 4 THEN '已注销' ELSE '未知' END AS statusText FROM vip_benefit b LEFT JOIN user_info ou ON b.origin_user_id = ou.userId LEFT JOIN user_info hu ON b.user_id = hu.userId LEFT JOIN vip_benefit_card c ON b.vip_card_id = c.vip_card_id LEFT JOIN store s ON s.storeId = b.store_id
ORDER BY b.created_date DESC
